svg.title: Sapien — didactic generational AI architecture
svg.desc: A professional research architecture diagram for Sapien, a proposed AI learning framework based on teaching not training, with generational knowledge transfer, adversarial collaboration, and permanent human-in-the-loop oversight.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is embodied grounded learning in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('How does intrinsic motivation work in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('What is open world learning in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('What is the computational budget in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of frontier model A in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of frontier model B in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('What does the verifier model do in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('How does instance A of 1st gen Sapien learn?')
sendPrompt('How does instance B of 1st gen Sapien learn?')
sendPrompt('What is declarative knowledge in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('What is causal reasoning chain in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('What is epistemic provenance in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of the human in the loop in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('How does generation 0 teach generation 1 in Sapien?')
g.text: Frontier LLMs A + B + verifier → teach 1st gen via supervised didactic dialogue

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does generation 1 teach generation 2 in Sapien?')
g.text: Previous gen teaches next gen — frontier LLM retires, WHY chains inherited

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the role of the human supervisor in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('How does human oversight handle verifier errors in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('How does adversarial collaboration correct errors in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('How does WHY chain audit work in Sapien?')
sendPrompt('What is cross-generational verification in Sapien?')
